name: Lattice Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate the sugar cookie dough from the dairy.
2. Freeze the cookie dough for 1 hour.
3. Slice into 1/8-inch slices and arrange slightly overlapping on the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
4. Seal the edges with floured fingers to form a crust.
5. In a bowl, combine cream cheese, sour cream, sugar, and almond extract; mix until well blended.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Set aside.
7. Pour the remaining batter over the crust.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
9. Increase oven temperature to 450 degrees F.
10. Spoon cherry pie filling over the cheesecake and spread reserved batter over the filling, forming a lattice design.
11. Bake at 450 degrees F. for 10 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing it.
VARIATION:
Substitute a 13 x 9-inch baking pan for the 9-inch springform pan. Follow the same steps, adjusting baking time to 40 minutes at 350 degrees F., then increase temperature to 450 degrees F. and continue as directed.
